File_Purpose: Zone 8 city research queue plus per-area audit register. City queue items are completed before a public cruising-area record is created. Area_Audit_Records records evidence, including several publicly displayable map points where an area has more than one verified access or reference point.

Research_Sources.Use: German, Austrian and Swiss discovery route; use its city index and cruising category to find candidates, never as the only current-activity proof.
Primary international candidate-discovery map for public-space categories including parks, woods, beaches, toilets and rest areas. User-generated entries require corroboration.
Secondary international candidate-discovery map. Capture visible last-updated signals and treat them as one evidence point, not automatic proof.
Dated city guides and community articles; useful for corroborating well-known public areas and extracting seasonality or broad access context.
City-coverage and travel-guide corroboration. Use only a city-specific page that supports the actual area; do not infer cruising from a generic city profile.

Research_Sources.Source_Name: Official city, park, beach or transport authority
Research_Sources.Use: Use only to confirm public access, entrances, closures, seasonal restrictions, facilities and transport. It cannot independently prove cruising activity.

Area_Audit_Template.Public_Map_Display_Level: Broad area or named entry only
Area_Audit_Template.Map_Point_Notes: Use several map points where an area has several separately confirmed public reference points. Each public point needs its own GPS/direct map URL and practical orientation label. Do not set Public_Display_Approved true until the point is reviewed.

City_Research_Queue.Research_Notes: Only public-space candidates belong here. Exclude all fixed businesses and all undated or weakly supported claims.

Area_Audit_Records.Name: Tiergarten
Area_Audit_Records.Activity_Evidence_Summary: Candidate public-area record created from user-supplied map references. No public activity claim has been made or dated in this audit record yet.
Area_Audit_Records.Access_Notes: Several candidate map references have been supplied. Verify public access, labels and current relevance before approving a public listing.
Area_Audit_Records.Public_Map_Display_Level: Specific public map point after review
Area_Audit_Records.Safety_Legal_Notes: Public park. Respect consent, privacy and local rules. A map point is a general orientation reference, not a guarantee of activity.
Area_Audit_Records.Fields_Updated: Map_Points | User-supplied Google Maps URLs | Candidate audit record
Area_Audit_Records.Additional_Public_Notes: The first and third supplied Google Maps URLs resolve to the same destination coordinates (52.513786, 13.345613). The second resolves to a separate destination coordinate (52.5157235, 13.3456958). Labels and public-display approval remain pending.

Map_Points.Label: Tiergarten map point A — label pending review
Map_Points.Map_Point_About: Specific public map reference supplied for the Tiergarten candidate record. Confirm the user-facing label and current relevance before publication.

Map_Points.Label: Tiergarten map point B — label pending review
Map_Points.Map_Point_About: Specific public map reference supplied for the Tiergarten candidate record. Confirm the user-facing label and current relevance before publication.

Duplicate_Map_Point_URLs.Reason: Resolves to the same destination coordinates as CRU-BER-TIE-01-A (52.513786, 13.345613); retained in audit only rather than published as a third map point.
